message:
Pin lru to 0.16 and widen detail scroll fields from u16 to u32

Item 1: Pin lru = "0.16" to avoid unsafe versions.

Item 2: Widen detail_scroll, detail_content_lines, detail_visible_height,
detail_pending_scroll_to, modal_scroll, detail_message_offsets,
detail_session_hit_offsets_cache, detail_find_matches_cache, and
DetailFindState.matches from u16 to u32. This prevents overflow for
conversations with more than 65535 rendered lines. Help scroll fields
remain u16 since help content never exceeds that limit. Arithmetic
sites updated from i32 to i64 to avoid intermediate overflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@ frankensqlite = { path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", package = "fsqlite",
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
-lru = "*"
+lru = "0.16"
 rustc-hash = "*"  # Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys (P1 Opt 1.3), replaces unmaintained fxhash
 smallvec = "*"  # Stack-allocated small vectors for hot paths (Opt 4.4)
 regex = "*"
